text:
Once upon a time in a sleepy town nestled between mountains, there lived a young girl named Lily. She had long, curly brown hair that danced in the soft mountain breeze, eyes that sparkled like little stars, and a laugh like chimperi bats late at night.

Every day after school, Lily liked to go exploring near her home. She loved feeling the cool crunch under her toes and hearing the secret songs of the forest animals. One particular autumn day, as she scampered through a thicket of leaves, she stumbled upon an old oak tree covered in twisting burlap sacks. At first glance, nothing seemed unusual. But then, she heard giggling. It was a strange sound coming from the sacks.

Curiosity piqued, Lily approached the tree. To her amazement, she saw dozens of little creatures hiding within—the most adorable critters she had ever seen! They were fairies, with wings like silk scarves and faces like baby masks.

The fairies noticed
